description.value: Aura strong evocation; CL 15th; Slot none; Price 51,500 gp; Weight 5 lbs. DESCRIPTION This staff is usually sheathed in a layer of silver and decorated with gold and amber sunbursts. A staff of illumination allows use of the following spells: Dancing lights (1 charge) Flare (1 charge) Daylight (2 charges) Sunburst (3 charges) CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Staff; Spells dancing lights, daylight, flare, sunburst; Cost 25,750 gp
